title: 4chan
description: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

items.title: /v/ Video Games: Capcom Survey: We want Jill back and Ada out.
items.content_text: Reminder: Resident Evil doesn't need more terrorists pretending to be heroes. Let Ada be treated as what she has always been: a compelling villain, not a role model. Jill, Claire, Rebecca and Sheva carried the franchise through courage, sacrifice, professionalism and genuine heroism. If you think Resident Evil lost part of its identity by glorifying morally ambiguous characters instead of its actual heroes, now is the time to let Capcom know. Many fans believe RE6 marked the point where the seri

items.title: /mu/ Music: The Chairman on Reprise is a study in why artists shouldn't own record companies…
items.content_text: The Chairman on Reprise is a study in why artists shouldn't own record companies. My researches into a catalogue that runs to some 100 LPs have yet to uncover a single title that comes near the great Capitols, and the compilations are not to be trusted. So rather than spending $60 for the choppy 81-song box, try this 20-song oddity, supposedly programmed by Frank himself at age 79 and duplicating only seven box selections. It anoints more Don Costas than Nelson Riddles and is surprisingly scant

There were three videos of that version, all official and with fewer than 100 views, but for some reason they were under the name of Doris Ray. She got it for her birthday when she was first diagnosed with cancer like around 2015. That’s all I know about this computer. I want to use it to play videos for my dad. I swear I’m no larp

items.title: /mu/ Music: "At the time I was in a band called Smile and I thought I was a pretty good guit…
items.content_text: "At the time I was in a band called Smile and I thought I was a pretty good guitarist. One day I hear Are You Experienced at a party and thought 'Come on, he can't possibly make those sound effects on 'Stone Free.' This has to be some kind of studio trickery.' Sometime later I caught a bus down to London to see Hendrix perform. And there you had it. He played the entire 'Stone Free' perfectly, just like it sounded on the record, and I thought 'Oh well, back to the drawing board.'"

items.title: /g/ Technology: What's the verdict on the Xbox consoles? It was an affordable way of playing Doo…
items.content_text: What's the verdict on the Xbox consoles? It was an affordable way of playing Doom 3, Halo, Morrowind, KOTOR, etc. Xbox essentially shipped with a Pentium 3 733 MHz, 64MB DDR, a (slightly customized) Geforce 3, and an 8GB HDD for $299. A GeForce 3 was a pretty high-end card for 2001 too, a GeForce 2 and Directx 7 were really the standards still in 2001. Xbox OS was basically hyper-optimized Windows 2000, it's probably one of the most performant consumer-oriented x86 operating system ever written.
